summary: Tested major refactoring of appliance repair React SPA. All 9 test cases PASS: (1) Homepage loads with all sections (hero, stats, how-it-works, services grid with tabs, pricing, reviews, FAQ accordion, explore links), (2) City page loads with hero, process steps, brands grid, CTA banner, FAQ, footer, (3) Service page loads with hero, CTA banner, brands grid, FAQ, (4) Brand page loads with hero and CTAs, (5) Blog page loads correctly without Helmet errors, (6) FAQ accordion expand/collapse works on homepage, (7) FAQ accordion works on city pages, (8) Services tabs switch between Kitchen/Laundry/Commercial on homepage, (9) Mobile layout at 390px renders correctly. No console errors related to Helmet, missing imports, or broken components.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successfully completed - ProfessionalLandingPage.js reduced from 779 to 350 lines
ApplianceRepairPageNew.js reduced from 1273 to 1108 lines using shared sections
All shared sections (FAQAccordion, BrandsGrid, CTABanner, ProcessSteps, CompactFooter) working correctly
SEOMetaTags and useEffect-based schema injection working as expected

homepage_sections.details: All sections found: hero-desktop, stats-section, how-it-works-section, services grid (#services), pricing-section, reviews (#reviews), faq-section, homepage-explore-links

city_page_sections.details: All sections found: city-hero, city-process, city-brands, city-cta-banner, city-faq-section, city-footer

service_page_sections.details: All sections found: service-hero, cta-banner, brands-section, faq-section

brand_page.details: Brand page loads correctly with hero, CTAs, and content (uses different template)

blog_page.details: Blog page loads correctly with H1 'Expert Tips to Keep Your Appliances Running', no Helmet errors

faq_accordion_homepage.details: FAQ accordion expands and collapses correctly on click

faq_accordion_city.details: City page FAQ accordion works correctly

services_tabs.details: Kitchen, Laundry, Commercial tabs all switch correctly showing appropriate service cards

mobile_layout.details: Mobile layout at 390px renders correctly - mobile hero visible, mobile CTAs visible, desktop logo hidden

console_errors.details: No Helmet, import, or component errors found across all tested pages

context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactoring completed and verified. ProfessionalLandingPage.js and ApplianceRepairPageNew.js now use shared sections (FAQAccordion, BrandsGrid, CTABanner, ProcessSteps, CompactFooter). HelmetProvider removed from index.js. All pages render correctly with no console errors.
